articles.description: India's dominant T20 World Cup title win - their third white-ball trophy in a row - shows the other nations need to catch up, writes Matthew Henry.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: India's third white-ball trophy win in a row proves rest of world need to catch up

articles.description: As if the ugliness of the 120 minutes wasn't enough there was disgrace as Rangers and Celtic fans invaded the pitch at Ibrox, writes Tom English.
articles.title: Rangers v Celtic: 'Disgraceful scenes as toxicity spills over in Old Firm cup tie'

articles.description: The opening race of F1's new era in Australia left the drivers with mixed feelings about what the sport had become, writes Andrew Benson.
articles.title: Australian Grand Prix: Was new-era F1 really racing or more like a computer game?

articles.description: Port Vale are bottom of League One, but they have reached the FA Cup quarter-finals for only the second time in their history.
articles.title: Port Vale 1-0 Sunderland: Bottom of the league, magic in the cup - Vale's 'incredible' run

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from AC Milan vs Inter Milan in the Serie A
articles.title: AC Milan 1-0 Inter Milan - Pervis Estupinan scores as AC Milan win derby

articles.description: World number one Luke Littler successfully defends his UK Open title, beating James Wade in the final in Minehead.
articles.title: UK Open Darts 2026: Luke Littler defends title, beating James Wade in final

articles.description: World number one Aryna Sabalenka hits 23 winners as she beats Jaqueline Cristian to move into the fourth round at Indian Wells.
articles.title: Aryna Sabalenka 'super-focused' to reach Indian Wells fourth round

articles.description: A masked fan unplugged a VAR monitor in a German second division match as the referee was went to the pitchside screen to check a penalty award.
articles.title: VAR: Masked fan unplugs monitor in German second division match

articles.description: England World Cup winner Matt Dawson discusses their historic first loss to Italy and why they need to play with more freedom against France.
articles.title: Six Nations: 'England's kick-heavy strategy failed them in defeat by Italy'

articles.description: Follow live text commentary, score updates and match stats from Leeds United vs Norwich City in the FA Cup
articles.title: Leeds 3-0 Norwich - Premier League side progress to FA Cup quarter-final
